---
title: "Format Decision Matrix — When to Use Which Documentation Style"
author: "UIAO Modernization Program"
date: today
date-format: "MMMM D, YYYY"
format:
  html: default
  docx: default
---

# Format Decision Matrix

> Authoritative guide for selecting the correct documentation style for any UIAO deliverable.

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Version** | 1.0 |
| **Date** | 2026-04-03 |
| **Status** | Active |
| **Machine-readable** | `data/format-decision-matrix.yml` |
| **Governed by** | `data/style-guide.yml` |

---

## Documentation Families

UIAO Canon operates alongside four established technical documentation families. Each has a distinct domain and set of strengths.

| Family | Domain | Strengths |
|---|---|---|
| Cisco Press | Teaching | Narrative, examples, scenarios |
| Microsoft Learn | Instruction | Modular tasks, product guidance, how-to |
| NIST 800 | Compliance | Controls, risk frameworks, federal standards |
| RFCs | Protocol | Protocol binding, MUST/SHOULD/MAY, ASCII diagrams |
| **UIAO Canon** | **Governance-Grade Unification** | Federated modernization, governance cores, adapter contracts, deterministic, provenance-first, claims-not-copies, drift-resistant |

UIAO Canon is the unifying, governance-grade layer above the four traditional families. It draws from their strengths and adds determinism, provenance, and adapter-first architecture.

---

## Decision Matrix

Use this matrix to determine which documentation style applies to a given deliverable.

| Use Case | Cisco Press | Microsoft Learn | NIST 800 | RFC | UIAO Canon | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| Teach a concept | Yes | Yes | No | No | Yes | Canon: if simplified |
| Provide product guidance | No | Yes | No | No | Yes | |
| Define a federal control | No | No | Yes | No | Yes | |
| Specify a protocol | No | No | No | Yes | Yes | Canon: adapter-level |
| Write a governance spec | No | No | Yes | No | **Yes** | Canon: best choice |
| Create an adapter contract | No | No | No | No | **Yes** | Canon: only correct choice |
| Build a modernization playbook | No | Yes | Yes | No | **Yes** | Canon: canonical |
| Publish a training narrative | Yes | Yes | No | No | Yes | Canon: story section only |
| Produce deterministic artifacts | No | No | Yes | Yes | **Yes** | Canon: highest fidelity |

---

## Key Takeaways

1. **UIAO Canon is always appropriate** for governance, adapter contracts, and deterministic artifacts
2. **Adapter contracts** have exactly one correct format: UIAO Canon
3. **Governance specs** are best served by UIAO Canon, with NIST 800 as a reference standard
4. **Teaching and product guidance** may use Cisco Press or Microsoft Learn style, but must conform to Canon structure when integrated into the UIAO corpus
5. **Protocol specifications** use RFC style at the protocol level and UIAO Canon at the adapter level

---

## Related Files

| File | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `data/format-decision-matrix.yml` | Machine-readable version of this matrix |
| `data/style-guide.yml` | Style governance rules |
| `docs/STYLE-GUIDE.qmd` | Human-readable style guide |
| `docs/governance/documentation-landscape.qmd` | Comparative landscape diagram |
